description_long: This is a modern, military-style fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage painted primarily in green with a dark cockpit canopy. The aircraft features a sharply pointed nose cone, a bubble canopy, and a single vertical stabilizer at the rear. Its wings are delta-shaped with noticeable wingtip pylons and underwing hardpoints, suggesting capability for external stores or weaponry. The jet is equipped with a tricycle landing gear configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a single nose wheel. Twin engine exhausts are visible at the rear, indicating a powerful propulsion system. The overall design emphasizes speed, agility, and advanced aerodynamics, typical of contemporary combat aircraft.
description: A green, delta-winged modern fighter jet with a pointed nose, bubble canopy, and twin rear engine exhausts. Features include a single vertical stabilizer, tricycle landing gear, and underwing pylons.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, bubble canopy, and wide delta wings with wingtip pylons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sleek fuselage, cockpit canopy, and tricycle landing gear with underwing hardpoints.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin engine exhausts, single vertical stabilizer, and the full span of the delta wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the pointed nose, cockpit, and landing gear, with clear view of the tail and wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, delta-shaped wings with wingtip pylons and slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines, rear-mounted with side-by-side exhausts.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy.
